data.title: Robinhood Markets Stock Is Rising Wednesday: What's Going On?
data.description: Robinhood Markets Inc (NASDAQ:HOOD) shares are trading higher Wednesday after the company provided a business update showing growth across customers, assets under custody and trading volumes.

data.title: Are Brands Ready To Tokenize Loyalty? Rarible Co-Founder Offers Lessons From The NFT World
data.description: Panel discusses challenges and opportunities of NFTs for brand loyalty in Web3. Success requires community engagement and gradual experimentation.

data.title: Why CN Energy Group Stock (CNEY) Is Up 155%
data.description: CN Energy Group shares are trading higher by 165% during Wednesday's session. The company announced it has been granted a 180-day extension by Nasdaq to regain compliance with its $1.00 minimum bid price requirement.

data.title: 5 Housing Market Trends For 2025: What Zillow's Forecast Means For You
data.description: 2025 will bring changes to the US housing market, with more inventory for buyers, unpredictable mortgage rates, and a rise in smaller, smarter homes.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Ideal Power Secures Multi-Unit Order For SymCool IQ Intelligent Power Modules
data.description: Ideal Power secures new orders for SymCool IQ modules and expands its global footprint, catering to electric vehicles and power conversion markets.
